# GitHub Copilot — Repo Instructions

These instructions apply to every Copilot/agent interaction in this repository.

## Architectural edicts

### Component independence (HARD RULE)

> **Every project under `src/` MUST be completely self-contained.**
> **Zero project-to-project references are permitted.**

The single exception is `src/AppHost/` (the Aspire orchestrator), which
references each runnable service so the entire system can be started with
one `dotnet run --project src/AppHost`. AppHost is **not** a deployable
component and **not** a place for shared application code.

**When tempted to share code between two services:**

- ✅ Inline duplicates into each consumer.
- ✅ Cross-service communication is HTTP/JSON only.
- ❌ Do **not** create a "Common", "Shared", or "ServiceDefaults" project.
- ❌ Do **not** add `<ProjectReference>` to any non-AppHost project under `src/`.

This rule is enforced by
[`ComponentIndependenceTests`](../src-tests/Contoso.AppHost.Tests/ComponentIndependenceTests.cs)
and the
[`architecture-fitness`](workflows/architecture-fitness.yml)
GitHub Actions workflow. PRs that violate the rule will fail CI.

If the test fails, **inline the shared code** rather than weakening or
disabling the test.

## Local development

- The Aspire AppHost forces children to `ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=Local`
  via `WithEnvironment(...)` so they load `appsettings.Local.json`
  (generated by `infra/setup-local.{ps1,sh}` with `DataMode=InMemory`).
- For manual `dotnet run` of any component, pass `--environment Local`,
  otherwise the project loads `appsettings.Development.json` (which
  contains Azure endpoints written by CI/CD).

See [`docs/local-development.md`](../docs/local-development.md) for the
full local-dev guide.

## Configuration naming

| Layer | Convention | Example |
|-------|------------|---------|
| Key Vault secrets | `PascalCase--Hierarchy` | `CosmosDb--CrmEndpoint` |
| Environment variables (Helm/K8s) | `Section__Key` | `CosmosDb__Endpoint` |
| .NET code | `Section:Key` | `CosmosDb:Endpoint` |
| `appsettings.json` | nested JSON | `{ "CosmosDb": { "Endpoint": "..." } }` |

See [`docs/config-naming-standard.md`](../docs/config-naming-standard.md).

## File-edit hygiene

- Read files before modifying them.
- Do **not** create markdown files just to document changes.
- Per-component appsettings live in `src/<component>/`; they are gitignored.
- Templates live in `src/<component>/appsettings.Local.json.template` and
  are processed by `infra/setup-local.{ps1,sh}`.
